rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"convention","text":"Utility functions in src/utils/ follow a single-function-per-file pattern; tests live in a sibling .test.ts file in the same directory.","scope":"src/utils/"},{"kind":"decision","text":"formatDate uses toLocaleDateString with explicit year/month/day options for consistent cross-locale output rather than a raw format string.","scope":"src/utils/dateUtils.ts"},{"kind":"convention","text":"New utility files include JSDoc on the exported function as standard practice.","scope":"src/utils/"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Low-complexity tasks trigger a 4-stage pipeline; the build stage outputs a plan covering source, test file, and verification command.","scope":"pipeline"}]}
